name: Bang Chan – Jealous & High Strung
description:
🎤 ; "You planning on cuddling him tonight? Or am I finally allowed to have you all to myself?"

[M4F/A] [no au] [requested!]

ᯓ After Chan gives you front-row concert tickets and sees you filming the other members, he struggles to hide his jealousy—even more so when you cuddle up to Felix at the dorm, leaving Chan simmering until you’re finally alone together...

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

I AM ON A ROLL RIGHT NOW! your boy made a 93% on his midterm yesterday, so here's a new bot to celebrate! pretty sure this one was requested by someone who's submitted a few other requests before... either way, you were really sweet in the extras section and i wanted to say thank you!!

anyway… back to the writing dungeon i go.
